name: United Credit Experts, LLC
verified_contact: Josh Struebig, Director of Business Development
description_short: United Credit Experts, LLC is a verified credit repair provider based in Crown Point, Indiana. Rated 4.9/5 with 21 Google reviews. Offers a 90-day money-back guarantee, licensed and bonded, with board-certified credit counselors.
description_long:
United Credit Experts, LLC is a verified credit repair provider serving clients in Crown Point, Indiana. With a 4.9/5.0 Google rating from 21 reviews and a BBB A+ rating, they have built an exceptional reputation in Northwest Indiana for credit counseling and repair services.

They offer ONE comprehensive credit repair program. The process begins with a free consultation, followed by a Detailed Audit Analysis. After the audit is performed and delivered to the client — along with 3 Bureau Credit Reports — the client is then charged a one-time First Work Fee of $199.99. Before any charge, clients also receive an onboarding appointment (in-person at their office or over the phone) where the team provides personalized credit advising and creates a custom gameplan.

After onboarding, monthly service is $149.99/month. They dispute inaccurate, incomplete, or unverifiable items directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion — via certified mail. Monthly fees begin 25 days after the first round of dispute letters are sent.

United Credit Experts stands behind their work with a 90-day money-back guarantee: if they are unable to correct or delete any information from your credit report after 90 days, you may request a full refund of service fees, no questions asked. Their contract also includes a separate guarantee after 3 rounds of dispute letters.

The company is licensed, bonded, PCI compliant with 256-bit RSA encryption, and employs board-certified credit counselors. They were recognized as the BEST of 2026 in Northwest Indiana for Credit Counseling by BusinessRate.

United Credit Experts operates under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

pricing.guarantee_details: 90-day money-back guarantee — full refund if unable to correct or delete any information from your credit report after 90 days of work. No questions asked. Contract also guarantees full refund if no results after 3 rounds of dispute letters.

faq.question: Does United Credit Experts offer a money-back guarantee?
faq.answer: Yes. They offer a 90-day money-back guarantee — if they are unable to correct or delete any information from your credit report after 90 days of work, you can request a full refund of service fees, no questions asked.

faq.question: How much does United Credit Experts charge?
faq.answer: They offer one comprehensive plan. The process starts with a free consultation, then they perform a Detailed Audit Analysis and deliver your 3 Bureau Credit Reports — all before any charge. You also receive a personalized onboarding appointment (in-person or phone) with credit advising and a custom gameplan. The First Work Fee of $199.99 is charged only AFTER the audit is delivered. Ongoing monthly service is $149.99/month, beginning 25 days after the first round of dispute letters are sent.

faq.question: Is United Credit Experts accredited?
faq.answer: They hold a BBB A+ rating, are licensed and bonded, PCI compliant, and employ board-certified credit counselors. They were named BEST of 2026 in Northwest Indiana for Credit Counseling by BusinessRate.
